Prior risk: pbest could be reset after environmental selection, weakening persistent learning
Resolution in v4.0.0: Added CALOTensorState lineage-aware persistent pbest selection/inheritance
Validation: unit regression: persistent pbest survives selection

Prior risk: Single/global-best learning encouraged premature convergence and duplicate elite storage
Resolution in v4.0.0: Added one canonical [7,D] HPEM with Best-1/3/5/7 [4,D] summaries

Prior risk: Normalized distances could treat equivalent discrete decoded states as different
Resolution in v4.0.0: HPEM maps discrete variables to decoded lattice indices for duplicate/diversity decisions

Prior risk: Global per-candidate credit had weak context and update-order bias
Resolution in v4.0.0: Added batched per-individual-regime contextual [R,O,C] operator credit and [R,M,C] memory credit

Prior risk: Flat or non-finite reward memory could contaminate sampling
Resolution in v4.0.0: Added bounded [O,H,D] context-aware finite success-direction memory

Prior risk: recovery_fraction was predicted but did not materially control search
Resolution in v4.0.0: Uses bounded weak-learner recovery proposals under stagnation/diversity collapse
Validation: runtime metadata and targeted unit coverage

Prior risk: Predetermined schedule could tighten or relax at inappropriate times
Resolution in v4.0.0: Added behavior-driven controller using feasibility/progress/stagnation signals

Prior risk: Voltage/tap/shunt controls could receive undifferentiated search effort
Validation: group tensor shape and optimizer regression suite

Prior risk: A literal blind run plus full rerun would double FE and violate fairness
Resolution in v4.0.0: Implemented discovery/learning dual lanes inside one shared FE budget

Prior risk: Late search lacked a coherent counted precision mechanism
Resolution in v4.0.0: Added HPEM/success-direction/group-aware adaptive-radius precision proposals inside the main batch
Validation: all proposals counted; no hidden solver/optimizer

Prior risk: Historical learning could contaminate strict primary comparisons
Resolution in v4.0.0: Strict benchmark mode rejects historical priors/warm starts; explicit transfer mode disables guard visibly

Prior risk: Uniform high-dimensional storage would duplicate state and increase memory
Resolution in v4.0.0: Hybrid 1D/2D/3D state, canonical memory, temporary [P,4,D] scratch, no persistent 4D CALO state

Prior risk: Duplicate decoded controls could waste physical power-flow work or distort FE accounting
Resolution in v4.0.0: Exact-only bounded cache/dedup reuses physical solve while counting every requested FE

Prior risk: Queued Matplotlib draw callback could print a deleted-canvas traceback during rapid Qt teardown
Resolution in v4.0.0: Pending draw callback cancelled on canvas destruction

Prior risk: Potential efficiency mechanism not yet proven beneficial under equal-FE ORPD ablation
Resolution in v4.0.0: Intentionally not enabled by default; requires separate development ablation before adoption

Prior risk: Architecture changes alone do not prove CALO best
Resolution in v4.0.0: Release explicitly requires frozen 30-50 paired feasible validated comparisons before superiority claims
Validation: synthetic diagnostic shows CALO not universally best vs TLBO
